name: Goose Task Planner
description: Use Goose as the planning engine while binding planner roles to configured AIssistAInt LiteLLM aliases.

properties.selectedSkillId: Exact id of one visible planner skill.
properties.reasoningSummary: Brief non-secret explanation of why this skill applies.
properties.inputs: Object of user/project inputs the future broker must resolve.

requestedExecutor.catalogId: Executor catalog id when the selected skill declares one.

cliPlan.command: Command hint from the skill metadata.
cliPlan.args: Array of argument strings with placeholders for broker-resolved values.

properties.missingInformation: Array of missing inputs or unresolved assumptions.
